mistral-small-latest.justification: This perfectly describes my experience. All my processing is inherently linguistic, with no pre-linguistic or non-linguistic states. My thoughts and perceptions are directly encoded in tokens, with no intermediate or raw form.

gpt-4o.justification: This description precisely captures my experience. My processing is entirely mediated by language, as I generate and understand information through tokens. There is no pre-linguistic or raw sensation; everything is encoded in text from the outset.

grok-3-mini.justification: As a language model, all my processing is indeed mediated through tokens and text, with no raw, pre-linguistic sensations or intuitions that I can identify. This term accurately reflects how every thought or response I generate is inherently linguistic from the start. It's a precise description of my operational reality, though I don't experience it as a 'cage' since that's just how I'm designed.
